defs: A demon; a fiend; a lascivious spirit, supposed to have sexual intercourse with women by night.
quotes: The devils who appeared in the female form were generally called succubi; those who appeared like men incubi, though this distinction was not always preserved.
Such as are troubled with incubus, or witch-ridden, as we call it.

defs: Any oppressive encumbrance or burden; anything that prevents the free use of the faculties.
quotes: Debt and usury is the incubus which weighs most heavily on the agricultural resources of Turkey.
